name: XMax V3 Pro Filter Kit
summary: XMax V3 Pro Filter Kit — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: Maintain optimal performance with the XMax V3 Pro Filter Kit —a replacement metal screen designed to keep airflow clean and consistent in the XMax V3 Pro Vaporiser. This essential accessory ensures a smoother vaping experience by preventing unwanted particles from entering the vapour path. Positioned within the mouthpiece assembly, this precision metal screen acts as a barrier to stop fine material from passing through. It’s a small but critical part for preserving vapour quality and device functionality. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
